name: year_offset range with where filters
description: Test case for year_offset range with where filters
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2018,2019,2020,2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('QB')), "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" as materialized (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "t34e413b29c067b4c5289c6c7a903e9ad" as materialized (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where
